text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ahhh... I had such a good time! That was so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I splashed around in the sea a bunch, and I got to
talk with everybody a whole lot!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Heehee, I made so many memories this summer!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, yeah! I did so much training!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'll always remember those long training sessions
we had together!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I've really grown, haven't I? Like, I think I've gotten fifty centimeters taller! And I got a tan, too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Oh, King! Let's compare our heights!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And with that, summer camp comes to a close.
